About Organization

The Uttar Pradesh Government is the governing body of the Indian state of Uttar Pradesh. The government is headed by the Chief Minister and is responsible for the administration of the state.

The Uttar Pradesh Government has released the notification for the recruitment of Anganwadi workers in various districts of the state.

About the Programme

The UP Anganwadi Worker Bharti Recruitment 2026 is a government-funded program aimed at recruiting female candidates for the position of Anganwadi workers in various districts of Uttar Pradesh.

The program aims to provide employment opportunities to female candidates and to improve the healthcare and nutrition of children and mothers in the state.

The UP Anganwadi Worker Bharti Recruitment 2026 is a great opportunity for female candidates to work with the government of Uttar Pradesh. The recruitment process is currently open, and candidates can apply online.

Candidates should carefully read the notification and check the eligibility criteria before applying. They should also collect the required documents and fill the application form online.
